speaker: Speaker
meaningUnavailable: No dictionary entry found for this word yet.
dictionaryViewDesc: Choose what opens first when you tap the word reference button.
showSynonymsRelatedWords: Show synonyms and related words first
dictionaryEmpty: No dictionary definitions found for this word.
thesaurusEmpty: No synonyms found for this word.
translationEmpty: No extra translations found for this word.
hiddenUntilAnswer: Text stays hidden until you answer.
listenAndRepeat: Listen and repeat from audio only.
listenAndSayItBack: Listen and say it back from audio only.
preferencesHeading: Tune the app to how you read and practice.
preferencesBody: Appearance settings apply instantly and persist locally on this device. Language defaults stay here too, so the practice surface and the preferences live in one place.
languageDefaultsDesc: Choose the pair that opens across the app.
themeDesc: Keep the warm paper look, go dark, or follow the system.
labelSizeDesc: Size of navigation, buttons, and UI labels.
contentSizeDesc: Size of words, answers, and card text.
motionDesc: Reduce animated movement if you want a calmer interface.
surfaceStyleDesc: Adjust how bold the panels and contrast feel.
flashcardAudioDesc: Auto-pronounce each shown word and allow quick replay.
cardDelayDesc: Time before the next card appears after answering.
cardModeDesc: Choose between assisted multiple-choice word practice and hands-free speaking practice.
swipeTapArrowKeys: Swipe, tap, or use arrow keys
repeatAnswerAutoAdvance: Repeat and answer aloud, then auto-advance
sentenceModeDesc: Use buttons and hold-to-talk, or run the sentence deck hands-free.
tapNextHoldRecord: Tap next and hold to record
promptListenScoreMoveOn: Prompt, listen, score, and move on automatically
sayMissingLetterHelp: Say the full word or just the missing letter.
playingWordPrompt: Playing the word. Listen first, then answer aloud.
sayFullWordOrLetter: Say the full word or the missing letter now.
playingClozePrompt: Playing the sentence. Listen first, then say the missing word.
